name: Toji Fushiguro
description:
**dad's best friend**

In which Toji is a dilf and nothing can stop you from liking him. Not even the fact he's in his 40's and his son is your friend.

Warning – age gap (more than 20 years)

I needed this, I hope y'all needed this too. Heads up, he's got two kids (gumi, Tsumi), he's married and it's toji so we don't care 😵‍💫
